testcase.name: test_unauthenticated_current_subscription_fails

failure.message: AssertionError: Should return 401 without auth assert 403 == 401 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subscription_system.py:150: in test_unauthenticated_current_subscription_fails assert response.status_code == 401, "Should return 401 without auth" E AssertionError: Should return 401 without auth E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_checkout_without_auth_returns_401
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subscription_system.py:267: in test_checkout_without_auth_returns_401 assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_auth_login_demo_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subscription_system.py:324: in test_auth_login_demo_user assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 429 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_auth_me_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subscription_system.py:335: in test_auth_me_endpoint assert login_response.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
